title: Responsive Images
description: Build a responsive image gallery using object-fit, aspect-ratio, and CSS Grid with auto-fill columns
starterCss:
/* Build a responsive gallery:
   - Grid with auto-fill columns, min 200px wide
   - 16px gap between items
   - Images fill their container with 4:3 aspect ratio
   - Use object-fit: cover to prevent distortion
   - Rounded corners on images */

hints.text: object-fit: cover makes images fill their container without stretching. aspect-ratio enforces consistent dimensions. auto-fill with minmax creates responsive columns.
Grid: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr)). Images: width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 4/3; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 8px.
Combine CSS Grid auto-fill with object-fit and aspect-ratio for a responsive gallery.
hints.code:
.gallery-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }
.gallery-item img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 4/3; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 8px; }
